name: Hand Gesture Control System
description: A computer vision application that enables touchless computer control through hand gestures. Uses MediaPipe for hand tracking and supports custom gesture recognition for various system commands.

name: Tech2Idea AI Chatbot
description: A conversational AI assistant that helps transform technical skills into unique project ideas using Google's Gemini AI with an interactive Streamlit interface.

name: CareerPilot Platform
description: A comprehensive career development platform featuring AI resume building, job search, career guidance, and technical assessments for job seekers and professionals.

name: StudySync Learning Hub
description: An AI-powered educational platform combining real-time video collaboration, interactive whiteboards, and intelligent study assistance for enhanced group learning.

name: Voice-Controlled Automation Menu
description: A sophisticated voice-controlled automation system that manages file operations, launches applications, and provides hands-free computer control through natural language commands.
